zh.lifeSummary: 當William Barrett於1487年出生在英國素福爾可布萊斯賀包時，他的父親John Barrett26歲，母親Lady Joan Faversham22歲。他於1509年與Margaret Love在英國艾可艾維勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年11月8日在英國素福爾可維斯塔爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可維斯塔爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Barrett于1487年出生在英国素福爾可布萊斯賀包时，他的父亲John Barrett26岁，母亲Lady Joan Faversham22岁。他于1509年与Margaret Love在英国艾可艾維勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年11月8日在英国素福爾可維斯塔爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可維斯塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Barrett was born in 1487, in Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, his father, John Barrett, was 26 and his mother, Lady Joan Faversham, was 22. He married Margaret Love in 1509, in Aveley, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 8 November 1547, in Westhall, Suffolk, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Westhall, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Barrett est né en 1487, à Blythburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Barrett, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Faversham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Love en 1509, à Aveley, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1547, à Westhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Westhall, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Barrett 1487 in Blythburgh, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Barrett 26 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Faversham 22. Er hat 1509 in Aveley, Essex, England Margaret Love geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1547 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Westhall, Suffolk, England und wurde in Westhall, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Barrett è nato il nel 1487 nel Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Barrett, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Faversham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Love nel 1509, nel Aveley, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1547, nel Westhall, Suffolk, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Westhall, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Barrettが1487年にイギリススフォルクブリスブルグで生まれた時，父John Barrettは26歳，母Lady Joan Favershamは22歳であった。1509年にイギリスエセックスエイベリーでMargaret Loveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年11月8日にイギリススフォルクウエスサルで60歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウエスサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Barrett(이)가 1487년 영국 수폴크 블리스버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Barrett(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Faversham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1509년 영국 에세스 에벨리에서 Margaret Love(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 11월 8일 영국 수폴크 웨스솔에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 웨스솔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Barrett nasceu em 1487, em Blythburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barrett, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Faversham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Love em 1509, em Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1547, em Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Barrett родился в 1487 г. в местности блитбург, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Barrett было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Faversham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Love в 1509 г. в местности авели, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 8 ноября 1547 г. в местности вестолл, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности вестолл, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Barrett nació en 1487, en Blythburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Barrett, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Faversham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Love en 1509, en Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1547, en Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
